description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a light gray brick exterior and large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure includes a spacious wraparound wooden deck on two sides, accessible by a set of central stairs leading up to the main entrance. The roof is a simple gable style, and the house appears to have two above-ground stories, with the upper level partially open to the interior below. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a prominent set of large windows on the front and smaller, more traditional windows on the sides and rear. The entryway is defined by a central staircase and a recessed porch area beneath the upper floor, providing shelter and a welcoming transition into the home. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a light gray brick exterior, large front windows, and a wraparound wooden deck. The design features a gable roof, central stairs, and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing large floor-to-ceiling windows, central stairs, and the wraparound deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, smaller windows, and the deck extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a recessed porch, two windows, and the continuation of the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the large windows, deck, and the gable roof from the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, smaller asymmetrical windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central stairs leading to a recessed porch with a simple door, no columns or overhangs, minimalistic design
